summary: Batch 1 Pre-Deployment Fixes testing complete. All 19 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: (1) Product selector for campaign creation with search from marketplace_listings. (2) Structured pricing: Base Price (read-only from product), Vendor Best Price (input), Group Deal Price (input). (3) Live Profit Calculator with margin, %, total margin, and status indicator (SAFE/WARNING/BLOCKED). (4) Global number formatting with thousand separators on all currency displays (TZS X,XXX,XXX format).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed campaigns for margin validation testing (low margin, negative margin, minimum margin)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 1 Pre-Deployment Fixes verified. Key features: (1) GET /api/admin/group-deals/products/search returns products from marketplace_listings with id, name (derived from slug), category, base_price, image. Search query filters by slug, description, category, tags. (2) POST /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns accepts product_id from catalog. (3) Structured pricing: original_price (Base Price from product), vendor_cost (Vendor Best Price), discounted_price (Group Deal Price). (4) Margin validation: rejects campaigns with margin < 5% or deal price < vendor cost. (5) Number formatting: fmtNum() and fmt() functions format all currency displays with thousand separators (TZS X,XXX,XXX). (6) CurrencyInput component strips commas on focus and formats on blur. (7) Live Profit Calculator shows Base Price, Vendor Cost, Deal Price, Margin/Unit, Margin %, Discount, Total Margin with status indicator (SAFE green, WARNING amber, BLOCKED red).

details: Products have id, name, slug, description, category, base_price, image, listing_type
Search query filters by slug, description, category, tags
Empty query returns all active products
Product name, image, category auto-filled from selection
Base Price (from product) displayed as read-only
Shows Base Price, Vendor Cost, Deal Price
Shows Margin/Unit, Margin %, Discount % off base
Rejects campaigns with deal price < vendor cost
Campaign list shows TZS X,XXX,XXX format
VBO info shows formatted unit counts
Deal cards show TZS X,XXX format
Deal detail page shows formatted prices
Homepage group deals section shows formatted prices
Strips commas on focus for editing
